privileged_info_summary: The task 'asset_integrity_quarantine@1' involves quarantining three corrupt Bridge Command simulator assets (BadShip_v1 with files BadShip_v1.x/ini/diffuse.png as loose files in /opt/bridgecommand/Models/Ownship; RustyBuoy as a folder in /opt/bridgecommand/Models/Other; CorruptTankerC with files CorruptTankerC.x/ini as loose files in /opt/bridgecommand/Models/Ownship) that cause simulator startup errors (mesh serialization, missing texture, parsing failure). Valid assets ValidShip (folder in Ownship) and GoodBuoy (loose files in Other) must be preserved. The agent must analyze /home/ga/Documents/bc_startup_errors.log, move only the corrupt assets to /home/ga/Desktop/Quarantined_Assets, and create a report listing removed assets. All data is entirely synthetic, generated by setup_task.sh.
